ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-14-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Fred Campagnoli (Specially appearing for Louis Giannini) for the Petitioner.

Mr. Campagnoli stated that the supplement/amendment to the account had been filed. The Court granted the petition subject to a written order.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Aguerre.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Feb-11-2008 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-10-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person. An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Attorney and the Co-Executor's for failure to file the Inventory and Appraisal and to show cause as to why powers should not be suspended. The return date is March 10, 2008.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Hill.
